content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1594: The road of fusion

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Ni Cang Tian

Several thousand Icy Frost Snow Dragons gathered, roaring and screeching indignantly as they crazily bit and tore Xue Yuan and his brother.

The Icy Frost Snow Dragons appeared in the form of cold air currents. In this glacier area, the cold power of the Icy Frost Snow Dragons was bone-chilling. The Xue brothers shrilled and screamed in agony.

Shi Yan was quite surprised. Seeing the two brothers about to be torn apart, he didn’t attack anymore.

“Aren’t the Icy Frost Snow Dragons the holy beasts of the Snow Tribe? Why do they attack the two brothers from the Snow Tribe?” SY was skeptical

Burning sounds of fiery flames came from a far distance. As Shi Yan was still bewildered, Han Tian’s loud laughter arose. He appeared in the shape of a burning man with red flames covering him entirely.

However, as soon as he came over to Shi Yan, the flames on his body subsided; and he returned to his human form.

“Snow Tribe?” Han Tian glanced at Xue Yuan and Xue Feng while talking. “No wonder why I felt Xue Ye’s aura. I thought he hadn’t died yet, which is why I hurried to come here. I wanted to fight him again, but here I have only two juniors.”

“You couldn’t find the Fire Power Upanishad Origin?” Shi Yan was surprised.

Han Tian nodded while wincing. “I’ve wandered around for a long time. Maybe I’m not lucky, as I haven’t found anything. Sigh! I think I need to keep searching.” Pausing for a while, his eyes brightened, “Oh, you’re just a clone. Hey, how about you? With your ability, I think you must have found something, right?”

Shi Yan pulled a begrudging face. “I got trouble. I came here to see if I could find any solution.”

“What happened to these two?” Han Tian pointed at the two Snow Tribe warriors, talking with hatred. “The Snow Tribe, since Xue Ye’s time, has walked on the wrong path. They’ve made Xue Ye the God of the Snow Territory. Damn! These two brats look like him. The Icy Frost Snow Dragons will tear them to death. They deserve that!”

“Your resentment toward the Snow Tribe seems big!” Shi Yan sneered.

Han Tian’s cold eyes were fixed on the two struggling Snow Tribe warriors as he said, “The Icy Frost Snow Dragons were the natives of the All-cold Snow Territory, living there before the Snow Tribe. I heard that the Snow Tribe was born by the Icy Frost Snow Dragon with a human woman. It’s not wrong to say that the Icy Frost Snow Dragons were the ancestors of the Snow Tribe. Over the recent tens of thousands of years, the Icy Frost Snow Dragons in the All-cold Snow Territory have given up the best cultivating areas for the Snow Tribe. They even watched over the Snow Tribe members, teaching them how to use the power Upanishads and protecting them for many generations.”

Han Tian’s voice was cold and slow as he snorted, “Too bad the Snow Tribe didn’t know how to repay the kindness they had been granted. To get stronger, they came to the place where the Icy Frost Snow Dragon souls rested and sealed those poor souls to increase their strength. They’ve trespassed on their own ancestors! Everybody hates them!”

Listening to Han Tian, Shi Yan commented, “Yeah, utterly despicable!”

“That year, I didn’t have any grudge against the Xue Ye, and when he traveled across the Mysterious Sky Clan’s territory, he didn’t do anything offensive. I troubled and challenged him because I saw the Icy Frost Snow Dragon souls sealed in his power. I know what he had done. Of course, I had to teach him a lesson!” Han Tian’s face turned cold and harsh. “There was a time I fell into bedevilment while cultivating my Fire power Upanishad. The evil flame had intruded my heart and bones. I went to the All-cold Snow Territory to use the cold air to neutralize my poison blood. There, I met the Icy Frost Snow Dragons, who had helped me a lot. They were very friendly and pure beasts...”

He remembered the past and was still touched by the memories.

Shi Yan suddenly understood; the Icy Frost Snow Dragons had saved Han Tian’s life. So, when he knew that his benefactors couldn’t rest in peace and their children had mistreated them dishonorably, he got in a really bad mood. No wonder why Han Tian had attacked and beaten up the one who was hailed to be the God of the Snow Territory.

While they were talking, the Xue brothers were killed by several thousand Icy Frost Snow Dragon souls. After those soul-form Icy Frost Snow Dragons had killed the ones that had sealed them, they couldn’t endure for a long time. Without the host, they lost their power, vanishing gradually.

“Seems like those Icy Frost Snow Dragons had a big grudge against those two. They knew they would vanish after their host died, but they still killed them.” Shi Yan sighed emotionally.

Han Tian didn’t answer him. He was standing with his head stooped to salute the Icy Frost Snow Dragons for one last time.

When all the Icy Frost Snow Dragons vanished, he sighed. At this moment, he finally noticed the glacier underneath, asking in surprise. “Oh wow! The glacier is shrinking. Oh hey, it looks like a woman body, isn’t it?”

“Mei Ji’s in there...” explained Shi Yan.

Han Tian changed his face, laughing. “This girl does have the luck God with her. She reached the Second Sky of Territory Ancestor only after several hundred years, and now, she has obtained the Ice Power Upanishad Origin. I’m sure we can’t estimate her achievements in the future.” He threw Shi Yan an ambiguous look. Apparently, he thought that Shi Yan had helped her to find this place and get the Ice Power Upanishad Origin.

“I didn’t help her. She found it herself. I’m here to figure out how to fuse with the Power Upanishad Origin, so I want to find some clues,” Shi Yan forced a smile and focused on watching.

Mei Ji knew a seducing technique, which was the innate supernatural ability of her Phantom Clan. Every woman of the clan was gifted with this ability, and it wasn’t a power Upanishad. Mei Ji cultivated the Ice Power Upanishad, which she had progressed over her entire life.

Thus, she was qualified to obtain the Ice Power Upanishad Origin. When she entered the glacier, she wasn’t boycotted as what happened to Shi Yan.

Obviously, Mei Ji was walking on the path of fusion. It was confirmed when they saw the glacier shrink and appear in the shape of a woman.

She was using the Power Upanishad Origin to refine her soul altar and body. As the glacier was shrinking, it indicated that the mysterious power of the Power Upanishad Origin’s principle was transmitted and absorbed into her body, soul altar, and soul. Eventually, the glacier would disappear completely into her body.

At that time, Mei Ji would become the Goddess of Ice power Upanishad. She would become the rule-maker who understood all changes and abilities of the Ice power Upanishad.

It was possible to use the Power Upanishad Origin to advance further from the Territory Ancestor Realm as well!

Among the group of experts who had come here, Forefather Dragon Lizard hoped to restore his ancestor’s bloodline; Han Tian wanted to search for something that could help him get through the Territory Ancestor Realm; and Montecie wanted to find all the mysteries and magic of Time...Each one of them had a clear goal.

Mei Ji wanted to join them at any cost, but she didn’t embrace a major hope. She just wanted to accompany Shi Yan. And now, the woman without hope ended up having the best luck. She obtained the Ice Power Upanishad Origin, and became the first one walking on the path of fusion.

“You should continue your search for the Fire Power Upanishad Origin.” Watching the glacier, Shi Yan said suddenly, “The two from the Snow Tribe had followed Sauron here. I’m sure Sauron won’t bring only two experts from the Snow Tribe. Yuan and Devour are here as well. They must have someone cultivating the Fire Power Upanishad in their team. You’d better not let anyone find the Fire Power Upanishad Origin before you.”

“Of course, I understand that! But I’ve been searching for a long time without a positive result. I feel I’ve used up all of my luck,” said Han Tian.

“Normally, Ice and Fire are the opposite poles. If the Ice Power Upanishad Origin is here, I think the Fire Power Upanishad Origin isn’t far away from here. You’ve been searching around in wrong directions for a long time, so you can exclude them. As you are here, I think it’s likely for you to find the Fire Power Upanishad Origin around...” Shi Yan told him his logic, hearing which, Han Tian’s eyes brightened. After several seconds, he nodded with a smile. “Sounds logical! I will follow this way. I hope I can harvest something with your luck.”

“Yeah, I wish the best for you,” Shi Yan smiled, watching Han Tian leave.

...

One of Shi Yan’s clones was wandering aimlessly to find someone who was fusing with another Power Upanishad Origin. He hoped to see and find out the key to achieve the fusion.

After an unknown time, he felt a familiar aura from a strange location.

It was Zi Yao’s aura, which had the pure, holy taste that only the scared divine light could have...

Right when he recognized Zi Yao, she had been searching for him for a long time, so she immediately sent him a message. “Get to my location. I found the Devouring Power Upanishad Origin!”

Shi Yan’s clone was bewildered and then turned into a jet of light, zooming toward Zi Yao.

Zi Yao finally exhaled in relief beside the devouring black hole. She calmed down, watching the black hole and the eight evil powers while waiting for Shi Yan.

One particular day, Zi Yao suddenly felt heavy and uncomfortable. She focused, her eyes seemingly able to see through space.

A black shadow flashed and ran away fast.

It was Devour’s hollow soul clones!

Zi Yao had known Devour for so many years. With that heavy feeling, she immediately got it. “Oh damn! He got me. It’s tough this time!”

The black hole and the eight evil power Upanishads were the powers Devour had been cultivating for his entire life. He had spent his efforts to cultivate this malicious power, and was also the ancestor of all evil power Upanishads. If he got the Power Upanishad Origin, his strength would skyrocket!

At that time, let alone Shi Yan, even Desolate might not be his equal!

All creatures would face a disaster in this sea of stars as Devour would swallow them all. Aiming at building himself and the Devouring Clan, he could destroy the entire world.

“Devour has spotted me. You gather all of your power and come here with all clones and host body!” Zi Yao sent another message. She knew Shi Yan had the power and that it was just one of his clones right now. It was alright earlier, but Devour knew about the place now. So, she decided on it quickly, asking Shi Yan to gather his full force.

“Okay!” Shi Yan answered and his body and soul departed at the same time, moving fast toward Zi Yao.
